title: Crypto Brief — 30 May 2026

sections.heading: Overview
sections.content:
Crypto Markets — Session Overview

Digital assets trade mixed Friday with Bitcoin consolidating near $74K resistance while altcoins show selective strength. BTC dominance remains elevated at 54.2% as institutional flows favor blue-chip exposure. Correlation with traditional risk assets softens to 0.31, suggesting crypto-specific dynamics driving price action.

Bitcoin
BTC trades at $73,810, up 0.60% daily but down 4.12% weekly, forming a symmetrical triangle between $72K support and $74.5K resistance. Whale accumulation above $72K suggests institutional backing, though momentum indicators signal ne

sections.heading: Analysis
sections.content:
ar-term consolidation. Critical break above $74.5K targets $76.8K, while failure opens $71.2K retest.

Ethereum and DeFi
ETH at $2,021 shows resilience with 0.43% daily gains despite 3.69% weekly decline. ETH/BTC spread compression of -0.17% indicates synchronized movement. Staking yields at 3.8% provide defensive appeal while Layer 2 transaction volumes surge 23% week-over-week, supporting ecosystem fundamentals.

Altcoins
BNB leads majors with 5.13% daily surge to $675 on exchange token rotation. Layer 1s show mixed performance: SOL at $82.43 faces $85 resistance while ADA at $0.2356 breaks minor

sections.heading: Outlook
sections.content:
downtrend. XRP at $1.34 consolidates pre-regulatory clarity.

On-chain and Sentiment
Fear/Greed Index neutral at 52. Perpetual funding rates remain slightly positive, indicating modest bullish bias without excessive leverage. Long liquidations total $89M versus $34M shorts.

Trade Ideas
LONG: BNB (exchange consolidation momentum), LINK $9.18 (oracle adoption), AVAX $8.95 (subnet development)
SHORT/AVOID: ZEC $521 (regulatory pressure, -21.37% weekly), high-beta meme tokens

Risks
June FOMC uncertainty, regulatory overhang on privacy coins, potential BTC ETF outflows if equity correlation resurges.
